evals.expected_output: INVESTIGATIVNA SPRAVA report in Slovak with CONFIRMED section (YEMANITY contracts, NACE mismatch, micro supplier flags), two INCONCLUSIVE sections, ASCII network diagram, CRZ URLs, ends with Dakujeme

assertions.description: Report starts with '# INVESTIGATIVNA SPRAVA: YEMANITY' and follows the deep dive template structure
All 6 contracts appear in the report with their IDs (11889441, 12036751, 12088132, 12058696, 12075436, 12059873)
Report explains the NACE 70220 (poradenstvo) vs construction discrepancy as a key finding
Report contains an ASCII network diagram showing YEMANITY connected to its buyers
Every contract ID has a corresponding CRZ URL (crz.gov.sk/zmluva/{id})
Both INCONCLUSIVE findings (Zilina 802/2025, Stara Bystrica) have 'Co nevieme' and 'Dalsie kroky'
Report ends with 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'
Monetary amounts use space formatting (e.g., '892 261' or '467 641') not commas

evals.prompt:
You are the report-writer agent. Read agents/report-writer.md for your instructions.

Write an investigative report from the following structured findings data. Save the report to outputs/report.md.

```json
{
  "report_type": "broad_scan",
  "period": {"from": "2026-03-01", "to": "2026-03-07"},
  "findings": [
    {
      "status": "CONFIRMED",
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "headline": "SVS Nitra s.r.o. -- sukromna stavebna firma so zapornym vlastnym imanim ziskala zakazku za 287 558 EUR",
      "supplier": {"name": "SVS Nitra, s.r.o.", "ico": "35922737", "nace": "Vystavba obytnych a neobytnych budov", "founded": "2005-02-24"},
      "contracts": [{"id": 12064598, "name": "Zmluva o dielo", "buyer": "Mesto Trencianske Teplice", "amount": 287558.49, "date_signed": "2026-03-04", "date_published": "2026-03-05"}],
      "flags": [{"type": "negative_equity", "severity": "danger", "detail": "Vlastne imanie -242 237 EUR"}],
      "financial": {"equity": -242237},
      "evidence": "Sukromna stavebna firma (nie statna org) so zapornym vlastnym imanim -242K EUR ziskala zmluvu o dielo za 287K EUR. Nie je evidovana v VSZP ani SocPoist registri."
    },
    {
      "status": "CONFIRMED",
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "headline": "HDH development s.r.o. -- sukromna firma so zapornym imanim -89 462 EUR ziskala zakazku za 107 994 EUR",
      "supplier": {"name": "HDH development, s.r.o.", "ico": "35912804", "nace": "Ostatne inzinierske cinnosti", "founded": "2004-12-17"},
      "contracts": [{"id": 12063040, "name": "Zmluva o poskytovani sluzieb", "buyer": "Sprava NP Muranska planina", "amount": 107994.00, "date_signed": "2026-03-03", "date_published": "2026-03-04"}],
      "flags": [{"type": "negative_equity", "severity": "danger", "detail": "Vlastne imanie -89 462 EUR"}],
      "financial": {"equity": -89462},
      "evidence": "Sukromna inzinierska firma so zapornym imanim. Zakazka 107K presahuje absolutnu hodnotu zaporneho imania 89K."
    },
    {
      "status": "CONFIRMED",
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "headline": "Prahovanie pod EU sutaznym limitom -- 4 stavebne zakazky tesne pod 215K EUR",
      "supplier": {"name": "Viacere", "ico": ""},
      "contracts": [
        {"id": 12053309, "name": "Zmluva o dielo", "buyer": "SUC TTSK", "amount": 214896.13, "supplier_name": "CS, s.r.o."},
        {"id": 12054420, "name": "Zmluva o dielo", "buyer": "Podtatranska vodarenska", "amount": 213122.54, "supplier_name": "TERRATECHNIK"},
        {"id": 12058250, "name": "Dodatok k ZoD", "buyer": "Mesto Hurbanovo", "amount": 210177.58, "supplier_name": "TOPSTAV"},
        {"id": 12053796, "name": "Kupna zmluva", "buyer": "BBSK", "amount": 210099.00, "supplier_name": "MAHOLZ s.r.o."}
      ],
      "flags": [{"type": "threshold_gaming", "severity": "warning", "detail": "12 zmluv tesne pod (210-215K) vs 3 tesne nad (215-220K), pomer 4:1"}],
      "evidence": "Po vyluceni nevinnych typov (dotacie, uvery, SFRB) ostavaju 4 stavebne zakazky tesne pod EU prahom 215 000 EUR. CS s.r.o. navyse nema ICO."
    },
    {
      "status": "INCONCLUSIVE",
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "headline": "CS, s.r.o. -- bez ICO, stavebna zakazka 214 896 EUR tesne pod EU prahom",
      "contracts": [{"id": 12053309, "name": "Zmluva o dielo", "amount": 214896.13}],
      "evidence": "Dodavatel nema ICO v systeme CRZ. Cena je 118 EUR pod EU prahom.",
      "next_steps": "Overit na FinStat/ORSR podla nazvu CS s.r.o. Skontrolovat original zmluvy."
    },
    {
      "status": "INCONCLUSIVE",
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "headline": "OptiStav s.r.o. -- zmluva za 370K s 5 skrytymi entitami",
      "contracts": [{"id": 12059258, "name": "Zmluva o dielo c. Z26", "amount": 370394.82}],
      "evidence": "5 skrytych entit v texte zmluvy -- neobvykle vysok pocet.",
      "next_steps": "Prezriet extraction_json, FinStat, foaf.sk sietove prepojenia."
    }
  ],
  "dismissed_summary": [
    {"headline": "NULL ICO zgrupovania (2 275 freelancerov)", "reason": "Datovy artefakt -- rozne mena zgrupenych pod NULL ICO"},
    {"headline": "Vikendove zverejnenie 1.3.2026", "reason": "Iba 35 zmluv, automatizovany upload"},
    {"headline": "Neskor zverejnena zmluva (666K dni)", "reason": "Datovy artefakt -- chybny datum podpisu 0202-02-19"},
    {"headline": "Okruhle sumy (nasobky 100K)", "reason": "Bankove uvery, dotacie, ramcove zmluvy"},
    {"headline": "Supplier advantage penalties", "reason": "Uvery a NFP zmluvy -- standardny pokutovy rezim"},
    {"headline": "Bezodplatne zmluvy", "reason": "Kolektivne zmluvy, energie, NFP zmluvy"},
    {"headline": "ZS Eliasa Laniho zaporne imanie", "reason": "Rozpoctova organizacia -- bezne pre skolske zariadenia"},
    {"headline": "Dvojiti dlznici", "reason": "Zmluvy su 'Uznanie dlhu' -- nie verejne zakazky"}
  ],
  "stats": {"total_contracts": 10332, "total_value": 658911762.63, "queries_run": 20}
}
```
evals.expected_output: Broad scan report with 3 CONFIRMED findings ordered by severity, 2 INCONCLUSIVE, dismissed summary table, CRZ URLs, period stats

assertions.description: Report starts with '# CRZ Investigativna analyza: 2026-03-01 -- 2026-03-07' and follows broad scan structure
CONFIRMED findings appear in order: SVS Nitra (HIGH), HDH development (HIGH), then Prahovanie (MEDIUM)
Report has a 'Preverene a vylucene (DISMISSED)' section with a table listing all 8 dismissed findings
Report mentions 10 332 contracts and/or 658M EUR total value for the period
Contract IDs 12064598, 12063040, 12053309 each have CRZ URLs
Report does not invent financial data, UVO records, or network connections that were not in the input
Report ends with 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'

evals.expected_output: Deep dive report with threshold gaming finding, no fabricated FinStat/UVO/network data, CRZ URLs, ASCII diagram showing DREVEX-Obec relationship

assertions.description: Report prominently features the 212 784 EUR amount being 2 216 EUR under the 215 000 EUR EU limit
Report explains the pattern: original contract under threshold, then dodatok raised it to 541 260 EUR
Report does NOT include revenue, profit, equity, or other financial data that was not in the input
Report does NOT include foaf.sk connections, RPVS ownership, or person names that were not in the input
Report contains an ASCII diagram showing DREVEX and Obec Liptovske Sliace relationship
Report ends with 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'
